query:
SELECT 
  dp.id as profile_id,
  dp.driver_code,
  dp.platform_driver_code,
  dp.name,
  dp.phone,
  dcl.id as link_id,
  dcl.company_id,
  dcl.status,
  c.name as company_name,
  c.company_code
FROM driver_profiles dp
LEFT JOIN driver_company_links dcl ON dcl.driver_profile_id = dp.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = dcl.company_id
WHERE dp.phone = '+12043321935' OR dp.driver_code = 'D-11903' OR dp.platform_driver_code = 'D-68544'
ORDER BY dp.id, dcl.id;
